title: UGC Belief Script
description: Schema for a single UGC belief-driven video script. Each script targets 1-3 beliefs and follows the E5 method scene structure (hook, problem, mechanism, proof, offer, cta).

belief_targeted.description: Belief IDs this script targets (e.g., ['B1', 'B3']). Max 3 per script.

duration_target.description: Target total duration in seconds (e.g., 30 for a 30s ad)

hook_variant.description: Which hook angle is used (e.g., 'H1' from hooks.json)

platform.description: Target platform for framing and pacing decisions

type.description: Scene type from the E5 method structure

dialogue.description: What the character says on camera. Word count must fit within duration limits: 4s=12 words, 6s=18, 8s=25, 12s=35

visual.description: Visual description of the scene (what the viewer sees)

veo_prompt.description: Complete Veo 3 prompt for video generation including camera, character, action, setting, and aesthetic

go_bananas_prompt.description: Go Bananas prompt for generating the first-frame image (if using I2V mode)

camera.description: Camera movement and framing (e.g., 'static selfie', 'slow push-in', 'handheld pan')

transition_to_next.description: How this scene transitions to the next (e.g., 'jump cut', 'whip pan', 'match cut')

subtitle_text.description: Text to display as subtitle/caption. Defaults to dialogue if not specified.

belief_addressed.description: Which belief ID this scene helps instill (e.g., 'B1')

scenes.description: Ordered list of scenes. Must include at least hook and cta types.

version.description: Script version number for iteration tracking

notes.description: Internal notes about this script variant
